name: Daocontract

methods.name: delete_proposal
methods.desc: Allow the creator to delete a proposal box (required before app deletion).

methods.name: delete_vote_record
methods.desc: Allow the creator to delete a vote record box (required before app deletion).

methods.name: delete_dao
methods.desc: Fully delete the application and send the remaining ALGO to the creator.

desc: On-chain DAO with proposals, voting, treasury & dual membership models.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Only the creator can delete proposals
Only the creator can delete the DAO
Only the creator can manage the whitelist
Only the creator can manage vote records
Payment must be sent to the DAO
Payment must be sent to the DAO treasury
Whitelist is only for whitelist-based DAOs
